Class AvroSchemaValidator

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.stream.schema.registry.support.AvroSchemaValidator
All Implemented Interfaces:
SchemaValidator
public class AvroSchemaValidator extends Object implements SchemaValidator
Author:
Vinicius Carvalho, Christian Tzolov

  • Method Details

    • isValid

      public boolean isValid(String definition)
      Description copied from interface: SchemaValidator
      Verifies if a definition is a valid schema.
      Specified by:
      isValid in interface SchemaValidator
      Parameters:
      definition - - The textual representation of the schema file
      Returns:
      true if valid, false otherwise

    • validate

      public void validate(String definition)
      Description copied from interface: SchemaValidator
      Validates a schema definition and throws an InvalidSchemaException when the schema is invalid. The exception is expected to have the violation description.
      Specified by:
      validate in interface SchemaValidator
      Parameters:
      definition - - The textual representation of the schema file

    • compatibilityCheck

      public Compatibility compatibilityCheck(String source, String other)
      Description copied from interface: SchemaValidator
      Checks for compatibility between two schemas @see Compatibility class for types This method may not be supported for certain formats.
      Specified by:
      compatibilityCheck in interface SchemaValidator
      Parameters:
      source - - The textual representation of the schema to tested
      other - - The textual representation of the other schema to tested
      Returns:
      Compatibility

    • match

      public Schema match(List<Schema> schemas, String definition)
      Description copied from interface: SchemaValidator
      Return the Schema that is represented by the definition.
      Specified by:
      match in interface SchemaValidator
      Parameters:
      schemas - List of schemas to be tested
      definition - Textual representation of the schema
      Returns:
      A full Schema object with identifier and subject properties

    • getFormat

      public String getFormat()
      Specified by:
      getFormat in interface SchemaValidator
